title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Quikr International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Quikr International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Quikr International Enterprises, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Ludhiana operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Quikr International Enterprises:
Quikr International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Quikr International Enterprises!
